channel.title: Persia on RaihnForge
channel.description: Recent content in Persia on RaihnForge

item.title: Persian, Rome, and Mongol Empire Compare and Contrast
item.description: Echoes of the greatest empires to span across history still chime resoundingly in the cultures, governments, and imaginations of today. The Persian, Roman, and Mongol methods of building, maintaining, and governing their empires held more similarities than differences. Though their fates were dissimilar, it was through frontier energy, astoundingly driven leadership, and innovative governing that all three secured not just war and bloodshed but long stretches of relative peace and prosperity (Davis 105). Studying these three empires’ stories, successes, and failures may still yet inform human civilizations today and in the future.
